assertions.text: 包含 ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE ... SUSPEND
assertions.evidence: ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE <schema_name>.<table_name> SUSPEND; 及具体示例 ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dw.order_summary SUSPEND;

assertions.text: 包含 ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE ... RESUME
assertions.evidence: ALTER DYNAMIC TABLE dw.order_summary RESUME; 等多个示例

assertions.text: 提到 SHOW TABLES WHERE is_dynamic=true 或等效方式列出动态表
